title: How the live-reload function happens
prompt: Explain how live-reload works in this repository: how filesystem events trigger entry reload and UI refresh.

items.text: Orchestrates live-reload: starts watcher, registers signal handlers, defines refreshEntries().
Calls watchWorkspace() to start the filesystem watcher.
Registers SIGNALS.workspaceChanged handler that triggers refreshEntries().
refreshEntries() uses running/pending flags to debounce concurrent refreshes.
Calls loadCodeFileEntries(rootDir) to rescan workspace files.
Calls app.refreshEntries(nextEntries) to update UI with new entries.
Closes watcher on renderer destroy to stop live-reload.
Bridges workspace watcher events into SIGNALS.workspaceChanged emits.
Calls getIgnoredDirs(rootDir) to compute ignore set before watching.
Calls workspace.watchWorkspace() with onChange callback that emits SIGNALS.workspaceChanged.
Uses emit() from signals to broadcast workspaceChanged events.
Implements debounced fs.watch watchers and rebuild-on-rename logic.
Uses Node's fs.watch() to observe file changes in directories.
scheduleChange() debounces rapid events (80ms) before invoking onChange callback.
scheduleRebuild() debounces (160ms) and triggers rebuildWatchers() to recompute watched dirs.
rebuildWatchers() closes stale watchers, creates new ones for added/removed directories.
listWatchableDirs() uses git ls-files when repository present for efficient file listing.
Uses git commands to optimize file listing and .gitignore handling.
Provides in-process pub/sub to notify app of workspace changes.
SIGNALS.workspaceChanged: SignalGroup used to broadcast filesystem change events.
emit() synchronously invokes registered handlers with try/catch error handling.
register() stores handlers and returns UUIDs used for deregistration.
loadCodeFileEntries() rescans workspace and returns CodeFileEntry list.
Calls getIgnoredDirs(root) to honor .gitignore and common ignores.
Delegates file listing and optional content reads to workspace.loadCodeFileEntries().
hydrateCodeFileEntry() lazy-loads file content and triggers render when ready.
Applies updated entries to UI; refreshEntries triggers full re-render.
refreshEntries() updates this.entries, recomputes types, and re-renders chips and content.
scheduleFileContentLoad() lazy-loads file content and re-renders when ready.
pruneAgentUpdates() removes agent prompts for deleted files.
